text:
今までにない地形とはいえ
応用を利かせればどうってこと
なさそうじゃない？

暑くも寒くもないんだし
足場も悪くないから
わたしは楽勝って感じかな？

しかもなんだかウキウキしてきた！
大陸が浮いてるくらいだし
わたしの心も浮いてきたのかも！

さ、気が乗ってるうちに
ポンポン行っちゃお

This place might be unlike anything we've
seen before, but as long as we put our skills
to work that shouldn't stop us, right?

Heck, I'm almost thrilled that we aren't dealing
with it being too hot, or too cold, or too hard
to move around, honestly.

I'm pretty excited, actually! Maybe whatever
has got this land mass flying has sent my
spirits soaring, too!

At any rate, let's get started before whatever
is hyping me up wears off!
